name: Bikini Heaven
short_description: Solve scrambled anime artwork and watch it come to life. Bikini Heaven is a free swap puzzle game where you rearrange any two tiles to reconstruct beautiful pin-up illustrations - then unlock rewards. Relax or race the clock across grids from 3×3 to 16×16.
detailed_description:
Unwind with a modern twist on classic sliding puzzles! Bikini Heaven combines strategic gameplay, stunning anime artwork, and satisfying animated rewards in a free-to-play package designed for puzzle lovers who want something more.

Strategic Puzzle Mechanics

Forget boring single-space tile movement. Our strategic sliding system lets you move tiles any distance horizontally or diagonally, creating fluid, brain-teasing gameplay that rewards planning and efficiency.

  • Standard Mode - Race against time and optimize your moves for high scores

  • Relaxed Mode - Take your time with no pressure, pure zen puzzling

  • Challenge Mode - Strict time and move limits with live progress bars

Four Difficulty Tiers

  • Easy (3x3) - Perfect for warming up

  • Medium (5x5) - The sweet spot for most players

  • Hard (8x8) - For serious puzzle masters

  • Extreme (16x16) - Weekly community challenge mode

Compete Globally

Join the Weekly 16x16 Time Trial, our flagship competitive mode where the leaderboard resets every week. Think you're fast? Prove it against the community!

Steam Leaderboards track your best times and move counts for every puzzle and difficulty level.

Unlock Exclusive Content

Complete puzzles to unlock:

  • High-resolution still artwork for your gallery

  • Premium animated reward videos (5-15 seconds of celebratory content)

  • Steam Achievements for collectors and completionists

Full Creative Control

Import Your Own Content!

  • Add custom images to create personalized puzzles

  • Unlimited replayability with your favorite art

  • All custom content appears in a dedicated "Custom Levels" section

Base Game + Optional DLC

Base Game (Free to Play):

  • 6 complete puzzle levels with animated reward videos

  • All game modes and difficulty settings

  • Custom content import (unlimited puzzles!)

  • Full Steam features (Cloud Saves, Achievements, Stats, Leaderboards)

Premium DLC Packs ($0.99 each):

  • 6 additional puzzles + animated rewards per pack

  • Themed collections: Summer Paradise, Sporty Girls, Sunset Beach

  • Season Pass bundle available with savings

Key Features

  • High-quality anime artwork (1600x900+ resolution)

  • Animated victory celebrations with particle effects

  • Relaxing background music (licensed chillhop/lofi tracks)

  • Steam Cloud saves - play anywhere, progress everywhere

  • Full controller support (Mouse, Touch, Gamepad)

  • 28 languages supported - play in your native language

  • Gallery system to review all unlocked content

  • Mature content (18+) - Suggestive poses and beachwear

Why Bikini Heaven Stands Out

Unlike other puzzle games with limited content and forgettable music, Bikini Heaven delivers:

  • Unlimited content through custom imports

  • High-quality video rewards worth working for

  • Competitive leaderboards for replayability

  • Strategic movement system that goes beyond basic sliding

  • Active development with regular updates and new features

Mature Content Notice

This game contains suggestive anime artwork featuring models in swimwear and beach attire. Intended for players 18 years and older.

Start Your Puzzle Journey Today!

Download the free base game and experience the tropical puzzle paradise that delivers everything players wished other puzzle games had.

Relax, slide, and unwind in paradise!

English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Arabic*, Bulgarian*, Czech*, Danish*, Dutch*, Finnish*, Greek*, Hungarian*, Indonesian*, Japanese*, Korean*, Norwegian*, Polish*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Romanian*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Spanish - Latin America*, Swedish*, Thai*, Traditional Chinese*, Turkish*, Ukrainian*, Vietnamese*
*languages with full audio support
